question.text: Under REIT Regulations, sponsors and sponsor groups must collectively hold what percentage of total units from the beginning of the fourth year to the end of the fifth year from the date of listing?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under REIT Regulations, the sponsor(s) and sponsor group(s) shall collectively hold: (i) 15% for first 3 years; (ii) 5% from 4th to 5th year; (iii) 3% from 6th to 10th year; (iv) 2% from 11th to 20th year; (v) 1% after 20th year from listing. **The Trap:** 15% applies only for the first 3 years. The schedule decreases over time, reflecting the reducing need for sponsor alignment as the REIT matures. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The decreasing sponsor holding schedule (15% > 5% > 3% > 2% > 1%) is unique to REITs - InvITs simply require 15% for 3 years without a declining schedule.
